name: Phoenix lawyer here: happened at work, boss used AI that hurt our rankings. Sue employer?

mainEntity.name: Phoenix lawyer here: happened at work, boss used AI that hurt our rankings. Sue employer?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possible negligence claim if boss's AI use breached duty, but employment law limits.[1] Key factors: policy violations, causation.[1] Review employment contract, document boss actions, employment litigator.[1] Tricky internal matter.
